memberdef.argsstring: (TIM_HandleTypeDef *htim, hf_u32_t timer_clock_hz, hf_timer_callback_t callback=nullptr, void *user_data=nullptr) noexcept
memberdef.name: StmPeriodicTimer

parameterdescription.para: APB timer clock feeding this TIM (e.g. 84 MHz).
User callback (may also be set later via SetCallback).

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Deinitialize the timer and free resources.

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Start the periodic timer with specified period.

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise
hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Change the timer period while running.

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

parameterdescription.para: Reference to store the current period

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get timer statistics and status information.

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise
hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, error code otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get description of this timer implementation.

simplesect.para: hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, TIMER_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED if not implemented
hf_timer_err_t::TIMER_SUCCESS if successful, TIMER_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED if not implemented

briefdescription.para: Call from HAL_TIM_PeriodElapsedCallback to dispatch to instances.
Recalculate and apply PSC+ARR for the requested period.

detaileddescription.para:
Design:
Accepts a TIM_HandleTypeDef* already initialised by CubeMX.
Uses HAL_TIM_Base_Start_IT / Stop_IT.
Provides a static dispatch table so the HAL_TIM_PeriodElapsedCallback (extern "C") can route to the correct C++ instance.
Period changes recalculate ARR+PSC from the timer's input clock.
